title: [Epic] K-200 System Architecture Definition
text:
Epic KES-001. Reporter: Dr. Rhea Voss (Chief Systems Engineer). Assignee: Dr. Rhea Voss. Status: Done. Priority: High. Created: 2023-02-10. Resolved: 2023-06-30.

Description: Define and baseline the top-level system architecture for the Kestrel K-200 autonomous maritime survey drone. Covers: autonomy level selection, propulsion configuration, battery chemistry baseline, comms architecture, GNC philosophy, and mass/power budgets.

Key decisions captured:
- SAE Level 3 autonomy (per customer RFT-K200-002 requirement, WIKI-003 kick-off meeting)
- Single-string GNC (FCU P-1091), BVLOS open-water ops only, hardware RTL fail-safe
- LiPo battery baseline (subsequently changed by ECN-312 after KES-341 thermal event)
- Quad-pusher propulsion, 900MHz comms at 15km range (P-1125, subsequently upgraded by ECN-322)

Architecture baseline: DOC-401 (System Architecture Document v1.0). Configuration baseline: ECN-301.
Kick-off meeting: WIKI-003. CSE review: REV-631 (Dr. Rhea Voss, contains critical architecture rationale).
